name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Remote Desktop Access from a Remote Host
notes: This Building Block identifies flows where a remote desktop application is being accessed from a remote host
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Remote Desktop Access from a Remote Host on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the flow context is Remote to Local
when the flow matches Application is any of [RemoteAccess.MSTerminalServices or RemoteAccess.RDP or RemoteAccess.Citrix or RemoteAccess.CitrixICA]
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Remote Desktop Access from a Remote Host on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the flow context is Remote to Local
AND when the flow matches Application is any of [RemoteAccess.MSTerminalServices or RemoteAccess.RDP or RemoteAccess.Citrix or RemoteAccess.CitrixICA]
